intents.response: Hello! How can I assist you with your college, university, or school enquiry today?

I am a college enquiry assistant chatbot. I can help you with questions about admissions, courses, fees, campus, faculty, hostels, exams, results, syllabus, and departments for colleges, universities, or schools. Just ask me anything related to these topics!
To apply, visit our website and fill out the admission form online. Admission is based on merit and entrance test.
We offer BCA, BBA, BSc IT, BCom, and MCA programs.
The fee for BCA is ₹50,000/year, and for MCA is ₹70,000/year.
Yes, we provide hostel facilities with mess and WiFi. The household fee is ksh3900 per semester.
